reviews.comment:
Tiene un espacio para estacionar el auto donde se puede descansar de la ruta y hacer picnic. Los baños están limpios.

(Translated by Google)
It has a parking area where you can rest from the drive and have a picnic. The restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaF9fSlFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es el lugar elegido por mi para parar tanto de ida como de vuelta a mar del plata, muy buenas instalaciones, limpias, ordenadas y con una arboleda que permite descansar a la sombra.

(Translated by Google)
It's the place I chose to stop both on my way to and from Mar del Plata. The facilities are very good, clean, tidy, and have a grove of trees that allow you to rest in the shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaC0yZXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención!!! Lugar con mucho espacio para descansar bajo arboledas y distenderse antes de seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! A place with plenty of space to rest under the trees and relax before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaDZLLU93EAE

reviews.comment:
A mano de todo

(Translated by Google)
At hand everything
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNLV83cm9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una parada muuuuyyyyyy recomendable al volver de la costa. Diría que obligatoria por su ubicación, limpieza, servicio y atención. Tiene un hermoso y amplio parque para pasar el día o al menos, parar a comer.

(Translated by Google)
It's a highly recommended stop on your way back from the coast. I'd say it's a must-see because of its location, cleanliness, service, and attention. It has a beautiful and spacious park where you can spend the day or at least stop for a meal.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNLTlySWx3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

It's not hygienic at all, there's no parking, and the cafeteria is inaccessible.

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas las fotos de las hamburguesas y NADA que ver las hamburguesas en si
Chiquitas,sin sabor etc el precio no se justifica con lo que te dan
Los baños ok
El lugar agradable ,por eso agregó una estrella

(Translated by Google)
The burger photos are great, but the burgers themselves are nothing like what you get. They're small, tasteless, etc. The price isn't justified by what you get. The bathrooms are okay. The place is nice, which is why I added a star.
